failures.test: Candidate portal — authenticated › Navigate to /candidate → candidate-portal visible
failures.error: element(s) not found — locator('[data-testid="candidate-portal"]') never became visible within 15 s
failures.root_cause: PRE-EXISTING: auth-flows project runs tests in parallel. The logout test (line 143) calls DELETE /api/auth on the shared candidate.json session, invalidating it before the /candidate portal test can navigate there. The candidate portal page redirects unauthenticated users, so the testid is never rendered. This bug was introduced in the Phase 2 commit (44b1086) and is not related to Step 6 changes.
failures.introduced_by: 44b1086 feat: CAX Web App — complete platform through Phase 2 + change request
